subject: M crashes with multiple sources connected
body:
Hello everyone, 

I have been having a lot of problems with M crashing in various different 
situations since I have been connecting multiple data sources. I have not 
had these issues before when just using a single source. I don’t know if 
these errors are connected or caused by different underlying problems.

I have the 20201104 nightly build on a workstation with 96 CPUs and 4x RTX 
2080Ti with 10 GB memory.

 

1.      M crashes when trying to open a previous session file for M. Error 
message attached

2.       M crashes at very end of refinement during reconstruction and 
filtering. There is no error message, the WARP workers just close and the M 
window as well. No reconstruction is written out.

3.       M crashes during refinement (see 2nd attachment)

4.       When extracting subtomograms at a pixel size of 2.2Apx, M crashes, 
while 2.5Apx is fine. The boxes are quite large and would be 275 at 2.2Apx.


Sorry for the long message! Has anyone seen these issues and found a 
solution? I have tried turning on/off the CPU option during refinement and 
reducing the batch size, but there was no difference.


Best regards,

Leonie
